name: EvoDRC: A Self-Evolving Agentic Framework for Automated DRC Violation Repair

description: arXiv:2607.20019v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Design rule check (DRC) closure remains a major bottleneck in advanced-node physical design. Although detailed routers are rule-aware, residual design rule violations (DRVs) often require manual engineering change order iterations. Automating this process is challenging because repairs must account for complex geometric interactions, preserve circ...
author: Bing-Yue Wu, Chia-Tung Ho, Haoyu Yang, Brucek Khailany, Vidya A. Chhabria
